name: Figma Design Handoff
description: When a designer comments READY FOR DEV on a Figma frame, this flow fetches the frame thumbnail, posts a Slack message in #design-handoff with the thumbnail and link, opens a Linear task assigned to the engineering project, and writes a row to the design-handoff Airtable. Replaces a manual handoff checklist so design intent and engineering tickets stay in lockstep.
